rawFiles.name: ourairports-airports.csv
rawFiles.notes: Downloaded by data-automation collect-transport-sources into an ignored local output directory.

transforms: Exclude military-only, tactical, and operationally sensitive records unless explicitly approved.
Map public airport identifiers into externalIds.
Remove Al Thaurah Airport (SOR) after follow-up identity, status, and safety review.
reviewNotes: Imported 6 public civil/reference airport seed records. Held 53 Syria rows for review, including military-only, heliport, unsupported, and small unverified airport rows. Al Thaurah Airport (SOR) was removed from canonical data after follow-up review because public references conflict on civil identity and status.
